{{Quote|You want me to do '''what'''?|Josephine Donovan|<ref name="SOR">{{JournalCite|5|Smugglers of the Outer Rim}}</ref>}}
'''Josephine Donovan''' was an [[Ambassador/Legends|ambassador]] and [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] and the younger sister of [[Jericho Donovan]], whom she loathed, and daughter of [[James Ortell Donovan]]. She was a skilled [[Astrogation/Legends|astrogator]].

==Biography==
===Paragon of virtue===
Josephine dutifully followed in Lord Donovan's footsteps, surpassing his skills in diplomacy. She became the pride of the [[Mindabaal Diplomatic Corps]] and was engaged in most royal activities in the [[Mindabaal]]ite court from sport hunting over dancing to language lessons. She served as the [[Ambassador/Legends|ambassador]] of Mindabaal and the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] liaison with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], hoping one day to take her father's seat in the [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]].<ref name="SOR" />

===Reunion===
While on a diplomatic mission that would formally integrate Mindabaal into the Empire, Josephine's [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was raided by [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] and she was kidnapped, only to realize that her kidnapper was none other than her sister, who had left Mindabaal several years ago and cut all bonds with the Donovan family. When they returned to Mindabaal, they found it devastated by an Imperial [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|planetary bombardment]]. That day, Josephine and Jericho teamed up as [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] to thwart the Empire's cause. Josephine would especially make use of her diplomatic skills and her persuasive abilities, which were augmented by her good looks.<ref name="SOR" />
